name: publish_page_post
description: Create a new post on a Facebook Page with text content, links, or calls to action. Requires a Page access token with pages_manage_posts permission.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Facebook Page to post to.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The text content of the post.
parameters.example: Check out our new product launch!

parameters.name: link
parameters.description: A URL to include in the post. Facebook will generate a link preview.

parameters.name: published
parameters.description: Whether the post should be published immediately. Set to false to schedule or save as draft.

parameters.name: scheduled_publish_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for scheduled publishing. Requires published=false.

body.message: Check out our new product launch!
